subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Thou seest Thy servant who hath taken refuge at the gate of Thy mercy, who hath sought shelter at the sacred threshold of Thy grace, who seeketh protection from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری عبدک الملتجی بباب رحمتک اللائذ بعتبه قدس عنایتک المستجیر بک من
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for forgiveness
